auth.firebase_not_configured: Firebase is not configured for this app — add your Firebase keys to app.json or .env
auth.welcome_subtitle: Sign in with your RoomAlyzer account

features.monitor: Real-time monitoring of temperature, humidity and CO₂
features.trends: Historical trends and insights over time

mfa.challenge_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.error_init: Could not start two-factor authentication. Please try again.
mfa.error_invalid_code: Invalid code. Check your authenticator app and try again.

tenant.select_tenant_subtitle: You have access to multiple customers. Pick which one to use now.

home.title: Overview
home.subtitle: Latest status of your sensors
home.multi_tenant_subtitle: Pick the customer you want to view data for.
home.module_unavailable: This module is not yet available in the mobile app
home.modules_coming_soon: More modules coming soon — Preservation, Water Detection and Space Management

sensors.title: Sensors
sensors.subtitle: All indoor-climate sensors in {{tenant}}
sensors.empty_subtitle: No indoor-climate sensors are linked to this tenant yet.
sensors.silent_hint: No data received for over 48 hours

sensor_detail.error_description: We can't fetch data for this sensor right now.

explain.empty: The battery is almost empty — replace the sensor soon to avoid missing data.
explain.low: The battery level is low — consider scheduling a replacement.
explain.medium: The battery level is fine — the sensor has power for normal operation.
explain.high: The battery is fully charged and ready for many months of operation.

explain.excellent: The sensor has excellent signal coverage and is sending data without interruption.
explain.good: The sensor has good signal coverage and is operating reliably.
explain.medium: The sensor has medium signal coverage — it works but may experience delays.
explain.poor: The sensor has poor signal coverage and may temporarily lose connection.
explain.none: The sensor has no signal coverage and is not sending data right now.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Water detection status — refreshes every 10 seconds
dashboard.no_sensors_subtitle: Water detection is enabled for this customer, but there are no active sensors that support the module. Activate or assign the sensors in the web app to use water detection on mobile.

feed.all_clear_subtitle: No alarms, silent sensors or heartbeats to show.

alarms.ack_all_info: You are about to acknowledge {{count}} active alarms in one go.
alarms.send_cancellation_desc: Notifies recipients that the alarm has been resolved
alarms.submit_error: Could not acknowledge the alarm — please try again.

map.subtitle: Geographic overview of water sensors
map.no_sensors_subtitle: There are no active water sensors in the selected location.
map.no_positions: No sensors placed on the map
map.no_positions_hint: Place the sensors on the map in the web app to see them here.

errors.network: Could not connect. Please check your internet connection.
errors.unauthorized: You've been signed out. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to access this.
errors.server: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.legacy_unavailable: We're currently experiencing issues with our server infrastructure. Please try again in half an hour. If the problem persists, contact support@roomalyzer.com.
